LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS HEARD ON ITS MERITS AFTER THE COURT CONSIDERED PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION WHICH WAS NOT FILED PROPERLY. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WITH THE DELETION OF "NO OPPOSITION FILED". DEFENDANT XIAOYU ZHOU'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. THE PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT WAS FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HON. PAUL H. ALVARADO REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
